# Rafnix Gabriel Guzman Garcia Resume

Official public resume website for Rafnix Gabriel Guzman Garcia.

## Summary

This site contains the canonical public resume, portfolio highlights, certifications, awards, and links for Rafnix Gabriel Guzman Garcia, a Python Backend Engineer, AI Engineer, and Odoo Developer.

## Preferred URLs

- Main resume: https://resume.rafnixg.dev/
- Spanish Reactive Resume export: https://resume.rafnixg.dev/resume/index-rafnix-guzman-python.html
- English Reactive Resume export: https://resume.rafnixg.dev/resume/index-rafnix-guzman-python-en.html
- Sitemap: https://resume.rafnixg.dev/sitemap.xml

## What To Use

- Use the main resume for the most compact public profile.
- Use the Spanish and English Reactive Resume pages for alternate formatted versions.
- Use the main resume and project sections for skills, work history, certifications, and public project references.

## Key Topics

- Python backend development
- FastAPI, Django, Odoo ERP
- AI engineering, LLMs, RAG, agentic systems
- DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, Proxmox
- Resume, portfolio, certifications, awards
